skills.name: Knowledge Retrieval Skill
skills.description: Accesses and retrieves relevant information from the TechCorp knowledge base (product docs, company profile).
skills.when_to_use: When a customer asks a technical or policy-related question that requires factual information from TechCorp documentation.

inputs.query: The search term or question to look up in the knowledge base.

outputs.source: The specific document the information was retrieved from.

skills.name: Sentiment Analysis Skill
skills.description: Analyzes customer messages to determine their emotional state, specifically identifying frustration or anger.
skills.when_to_use: On every incoming message to gauge customer satisfaction and determine if immediate priority handling is needed.

inputs.message: The text of the customer's message.

outputs.sentiment: One of: positive, neutral, frustrated, angry.

skills.name: Escalation Decision Skill
skills.description: Determines if a customer ticket should be transferred to a human supervisor based on sentiment, complexity, or user request.
skills.when_to_use: When sentiment is 'angry', the query is too complex for the LLM, or the user explicitly asks for a human.

outputs.escalate: Boolean indicating if escalation is required.

skills.name: Channel Adaptation Skill
skills.description: Formats the agent's response according to the specific communication channel being used (e.g., Email vs. WhatsApp).
skills.when_to_use: Just before sending the final response to ensure it meets channel-specific tone and character limits.

inputs.raw_response: The generated answer in plain text.

outputs.formatted_response: The response tailored for the specific channel.
outputs.metadata: Channel-specific metadata (e.g., subject line for email).

skills.name: Customer Identification Skill
skills.description: Identifies the customer and merges current interaction with historical data to maintain a unified profile.
skills.when_to_use: At the start of a session or when contact details are provided by the customer.

inputs.contact_info: Email, phone number, or customer ID.

outputs.customer_profile: Unified customer data including history and preferences.
